notes: Extended cases for iterative in-order traversal of a binary search tree.

cases.name: sample_inorder_iterative
expect_contains_all: The resulting in-order traversal of the binary search tree is: 10 15 18 20 50

cases.name: duplicates_are_ignored_and_output_remains_sorted
expect_contains_all: The resulting in-order traversal of the binary search tree is: 10 15 20 25

cases.name: single_node_inorder
expect_contains_all: The resulting in-order traversal of the binary search tree is: 42
